# Dynamic React Business Forms

> A React library for rendering complex, configuration-driven forms with a built-in business rules engine. Define forms as JSON configurations and the library handles rendering, validation, auto-save, and field interactions automatically. Published as `@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core` (framework-agnostic engine) and `@bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent` (Fluent UI v9 field components).

The library centers on three key concepts: a **declarative business rules engine** that evaluates field dependencies, visibility, required state, and computed values from JSON config; a **component injection system** where UI field implementations are registered by string key and rendered via `React.cloneElement`; and **pluggable registries** for custom validation and value functions referenced by name in field configs.

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide with quick start, field types, architecture diagram, and examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture, rendering pipeline, key directories, and coding conventions
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history

## API

### @bghcore/dynamic-forms-core

- **Providers**: `BusinessRulesProvider`, `InjectedHookFieldProvider` -- React context providers that must wrap the form tree
- **Components**: `HookInlineForm` (entry point), `HookInlineFormFields`, `HookRenderField`, `HookFieldWrapper`, `HookConfirmInputsModal`
- **Business Rules**: `ProcessAllBusinessRules`, `ProcessFieldBusinessRule`, `CombineBusinessRules`, `GetDefaultBusinessRules`
- **Form Helpers**: `CombineSchemaConfig`, `GetFieldsToRender`, `CheckFieldValidationRules`, `ExecuteValueFunction`
- **Registries**: `registerValidations()`, `registerValueFunctions()` -- plug in custom functions by name
- **Types**: `IFieldConfig`, `IBusinessRule`, `IHookFieldSharedProps<T>`, `IBusinessRulesState`, `IDropdownOption`, `ComponentTypes`

### @bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent

- **Registry**: `createFluentFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedHookFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton
- **Helpers**: `FieldClassName`, `GetFieldDataTestId`, `formatDateTime`

## Examples

### Minimal Setup

```tsx
import { BusinessRulesProvider, InjectedHookFieldProvider, UseInjectedHookFieldContext, HookInlineForm } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent";

function FieldRegistrar({ children }) {
  const { setInjectedFields } = UseInjectedHookFieldContext();
  useEffect(() => setInjectedFields(createFluentFieldRegistry()), []);
  return <>{children}</>;
}

<BusinessRulesProvider>
  <InjectedHookFieldProvider>
    <FieldRegistrar>
      <HookInlineForm
        configName="myForm"
        programName="myApp"
        fieldConfigs={{ name: { component: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true } }}
        defaultValues={{ name: "" }}
        saveData={async (data) => data}
      />
    </FieldRegistrar>
  </InjectedHookFieldProvider>
</BusinessRulesProvider>
```

### Business Rules (Declarative Dependencies)

```tsx
const fieldConfigs = {
  type: {
    component: "Dropdown",
    label: "Type",
    dropdownOptions: [{ key: "bug", text: "Bug" }, { key: "feature", text: "Feature" }],
    dependencies: {
      bug: { severity: { required: true, hidden: false } },
      feature: { severity: { hidden: true } },
    },
  },
  severity: { component: "Dropdown", label: "Severity", hidden: true },
};
```

### Custom Validation and Value Functions

```tsx
import { registerValidations, registerValueFunctions } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

registerValidations({
  maxLength100: (value) => typeof value === "string" && value.length > 100 ? "Max 100 chars" : undefined,
});

registerValueFunctions({
  setTimestamp: () => new Date().toISOString(),
});
```
